{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034934172C2391052D3FD57FAE"}"},"total":322},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616902114241413913","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"思路独特，写得还不错。作者再接再励，千万别断更。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773450957,"group_id":"7593725878836677656","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N76JRkQ+bD1UVlULzgyieR/ITF3wXczNJ7TH709rKw7Y","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4234933997154583","user_name":"众里寻她千百度"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4234933997154583","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7593725878836677656","book_info":{"abstract":"【评分刚出，后续会涨，千万别被误导，进来尝尝咸淡再说~】
【第四天灾】【历史脑洞】【爽文】【争霸】【基建】【大明】
穿越明末，秦楚蛰伏一年，眼看崇祯就要上吊，天下将倾！
金銮殿上，满朝软骨头跪求投降，他忍无可忍！
“陛下，封我为王，赐我兵权，臣能召唤天兵，为您荡平四海！”
一场惊天豪赌，崇祯将国运押在秦楚身上，
封其为开国以来第一位异姓王！
系统激活，秦楚反手连通蓝星，发布游戏！
从此，大明的画风彻底跑偏！
缺兵？亿万玩家嗷嗷待哺，把杀敌当KPI！
缺粮？农业系大佬手搓超级水稻，亩产三千斤！
缺武器？科研狂魔连夜肝出燧发枪图纸，
甚至开始研究蒸汽坦克！
吴三桂想投降？
玩家：“不行！世界BOSS怎么能投降？杀三百遍，把他的装备爆干净！”
多尔衮想议和？
秦楚：“抱歉，那是我们下个版本的资料片最终BOSS，玩家们还指望他掉落龙袍时装呢！”
坐看玩家横扫全球，秦楚一边数着王朝气运值，
一边思考着终极问题：
当大明征服了地球，下一个资料片，是《星辰大海》还是《殖民宇宙》？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/15f6ee6955d88f0dc5921933fd556316","author":"我那第二根羽毛","author_id":"","book_id":"7593725878836677656","book_name":"大明全是玩家，这让满清怎么玩？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"21.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7593725967919481368","read_count":"218484","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"589640"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"231","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,基建,争霸,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c7a2fcbfc39e34983825fd80f31aaf7c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392974&x-signature=AmkL6VLdvp8jCZieFr1pMSjtGuI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1925962282834206","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034934172C2391052D3FD57FAE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读52分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forw
